plan_approved.note: TASK-22 comment #2 records operator approval of doc-31.

guard_current_target.note: The behavioral Git fixture proves a concurrent main advance rejects the ordinary non-force publication.

preserve_operator_merge.note: The self-merge exception is limited to the dedicated OpenWiki maintainer; PR #61 remains operator-merged.

present_once.note: The policy check enforces final-boundary presentation and TASK-22 comment #3 records the accepted one-window UAT.

preserve_openwiki_layout.note: The isolation regression compares OpenWiki layout output byte-for-byte with bpmn-auto-layout.

check_retry_join.note: TASK-22 comment #4 records the final post-fix verification pass.

run_behavior_checks.note: All 18 pipeline tests, six workflow wrappers, shell checks, and deterministic plan reproduction passed.

checks_green.note: PR #61 is open, mergeable, and CLEAN; GitHub reports no configured branch checks, so the recorded fresh local suite is the applicable check evidence.

fix_in_scope_failure.note: Independent review findings about target races, wide-label overlap, and label-crossing edges were fixed and the exact deltas re-reviewed cleanly.

operator_uat.note: TASK-22 comment #3 records the hands-on review of the single final presentation.

uat_accepted.note: The operator replied proceed after reviewing the final plan presentation.

fix_presentation.note: The approval presentation was accepted, so the rejection-only correction path was not taken.

complete_qq_delivery.note: The reviewed, locally green source Change was committed, pushed, and handed off in the ordinary operator-merged PR.

green_pr_ready.note: PR #61 is open, mergeable, and CLEAN at the planned handoff boundary.
